lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello...

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: I distinctly remember you saying you were going to stop talking to me. Yet here you are again, yakking on and on in my earhole when I'm trying to cook! What do you want now?

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: What do you want? I'm busy!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you cook me something?

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: What? No! Go away.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, you're meant to be a cook. Why can't you cook something for me?

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: I don't want to, that's why! Now, leave me alone.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're not a very nice man.

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Yet you keep talking to me!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Good point. I should stop that.

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Yes, do us both a favour.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why do you work here?

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Why do you think I work in a disreputable inn filled with rough scoundrels on the very edge of the Wilderness? I work here because I need the job!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you like it?

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Like it? It's sucked the warmth and humanity out of me, and I've become a hollow shell holding nothing but anger, misery and gourmet recipes.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh.

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: What did you expect to hear? I suppose you expected me to tell you an inspiring story about how working here can teach you to find hope in the darkest places, or how to see the best in everything?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Maybe you should think about moving to a different inn.

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Bah! I'm not letting it defeat me. Now, let me concentrate on my cooking.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me any good jokes?

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: Ohhh, if you insist...

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: What did the half-wit say to the cook?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't know.

lines.speaker: Cook
lines.text: [He/She/They] said 'Can you tell me any good jokes?' Got ya! Hahahaha!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Whatever.
